summary: Improves local safety checks, update reliability, and structured roadmap creation for agent workflows.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogTitle: Local reliability and agent workflow improvements
changelogSummary: This release tightens local file and update handling, improves agent-created card workflows, and expands regression coverage for board history, ordering, and release rehearsals.
